title: Signed-out visitor is blocked from the admin dashboard
description: A signed-out visitor who opens the admin route is restricted from viewing the protected dashboard and is redirected or shown an access restriction.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify access to the admin area is restricted
Verify authentication is required to continue

title: Open the public home page
description: This verifies that a visitor can load the public landing page and see the app entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the home page content is displayed
Verify links to authentication and shopping are available

title: Sign in successfully from the authentication page
description: This verifies that a user can submit valid login details and reach an authenticated success state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify an authenticated success state is visible
Verify post-login access is granted

title: Public home page loads and offers entry points
description: A visitor can open the home page and see navigation to the authentication and shop areas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the home page content is visible
Verify navigation to the authentication and shop areas is available

title: Block direct admin access while signed out
description: This verifies that an unauthenticated visitor is restricted from the admin dashboard and is redirected or blocked from viewing protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify access to protected admin content is restricted
Verify a sign-in prompt or redirect is shown

title: Authenticated user can sign in and reach the admin dashboard
description: A user can sign in on the authentication page and then access the admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard content is visible
Verify authenticated admin access is available

title: Access the admin dashboard after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can navigate to the protected admin dashboard and view it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard content is displayed
Verify protected admin access is available

title: Browse the shop page as a visitor
description: This verifies that an unauthenticated visitor can open the shop page and see the public shopping experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Verify the shop page content is displayed
Verify shopping content is available

title: Authenticated user can move from auth to shop and back to admin
description: A signed-in user can navigate between the auth, shop, and admin areas and return to the protected dashboard without losing access.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the shop page
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard content is visible
Verify authenticated access is still available after navigation

title: Stay signed in while moving from auth to admin
description: This verifies that after a successful login, the user can continue to the protected admin area without losing authenticated access.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Click the link to the home page
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard remains accessible after navigation
Verify signed-in access is preserved

title: Move between the public pages and auth entry point
description: This verifies that a visitor can navigate between home, auth, and shop routes and each page renders correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the authentication page
Click the link to the home page
Click the link to the shop page
Verify the shop page content is displayed
Verify page-to-page navigation works across public routes

title: Auth page handles empty login submission
description: A visitor who submits the sign-in form without credentials sees validation feedback instead of an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the admin dashboard is not visible

title: Handle an invalid login attempt
description: This verifies that submitting incorrect login details keeps the user signed out and shows a login validation error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify authenticated access is not granted

title: Auth page handles repeated invalid login attempts
description: A visitor who repeatedly submits invalid credentials continues to see a failed sign-in state and does not gain admin access.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the admin dashboard is not visible

title: Show a fallback page for an unmatched route
description: This verifies that an invalid route displays a not-found or fallback state instead of application content.

steps.description: Navigate to /does-not-exist
Verify a not-found or fallback page is displayed

title: Unknown route shows a not found state
description: A visitor who opens an unmatched route sees the app's not found handling instead of a normal page.

steps.description: Navigate to /unknown-route
Verify a not found state is visible
